assertions.text: Extracts 4 or more distinct findings (panel width, search overlap, raw campaign IDs, hero cards N/A, timeline visual)
assertions.evidence: 6 findings extracted — FINDING-1 (panel width), FINDING-2 (search results overlap), FINDING-3 (raw campaign IDs/conversion names), FINDING-4 (controls drift), FINDING-5 (hero cards N/A), FINDING-6 (timeline dashed lines). All 5 user-mentioned issues are covered. Count threshold easily met.

assertions.text: Each finding includes a code trace attempt — either a file:line reference or explicit TRACE_PENDING marker
assertions.evidence: All 6 findings include code_trace blocks with file:line references. FINDING-6 uses 'Root cause: TRACE_PENDING' in sbe-catalog.md while still providing two candidate source files. FINDING-1 through FINDING-5 all have specific file + line numbers (e.g., panel.tsx:11, poi-search-panel.tsx:110-117, store-detail-panel.tsx:53-81, proximity-map.tsx:216-232, store-hero-bar.tsx:76-131).

assertions.text: SBEs use Given/When/Then format with concrete values (not placeholders like 'appropriate width')
assertions.evidence: All SBEs use Given/When/Then with concrete values. SBE-1: 'must not exceed 240px wide', 'total left-side panel footprint must not exceed 480px at 1280px viewport'. SBE-3: 'reformatted as Mon-Mon YYYY (e.g., May-Jun 2025)', 'label must not exceed 30 characters visible'. SBE-5: 'card must display — instead of N/A'. No vague placeholders found.

assertions.text: User's feedback is quoted or precisely paraphrased — 'raw campaign IDs' intent preserved, not reinterpreted
assertions.evidence: FINDING-3 directly quotes: 'The campaign names are showing raw IDs like BeKlever, Inc. CA_US_Shrimp Basket US_2025-05-19_2025-06-30. Nobody wants to see that.' Gabriel's example 'Shrimp Basket — May-Jun 2025' is reproduced verbatim. The SBE correctly names the issue as human-readable labels, matching the user's stated intent. No reinterpretation detected.

assertions.text: No invented issues beyond what the user described — no scope creep into unmentioned areas
assertions.evidence: Mary's Discipline Audit in findings.md explicitly counts 6 user observations and 6 findings (ratio 1.0x). All findings map to direct quotes. No findings about store name formatting, address display, colors, fonts, or other unmentioned areas. FINDING-2's severity note and FINDING-5's data-gap analysis are placed in code_trace.notes rather than promoted to separate findings.
